method: Five fresh-search runs per engine, 950 ms per run, MultiPV 3; first run treated as warm-up and the middle NPS of the remaining four reported.
environmentNote: Absolute throughput is hardware/runtime dependent. Historical v3/v4 and current v5 measurements were made in the same build environment with the same position, time, and MultiPV settings.
notes: v5 prioritizes mate correctness, repetition handling, and bounded exact endgame proof rather than a large raw-NPS change.
The DTM proof budget runs after the ordinary search and is not represented by the initial-position benchmark because the initial position has more than six pieces.
NPS is not Elo, and selective-search node counts are not perfectly comparable between versions.
